name: Watts Co., Ltd.
summary: Watts Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the wholesale and retail trade of daily necessities and miscellaneous goods in Japan, China, Malaysia, Peru, and internationally. It engages in the wholesale of imported interior products; import and export, and processing business of household goods; and general merchandise retail business. The company operates its stores under the 100-Yen shop brand. It also operates a grocery store under the Buona vita brand; miscellaneous goods under the AMANO brand; and uniform shop under the KOMONOYA and KOMONOKAEN brands. Watts Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
